content.text:
You are applying code migration fixes to a single file.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/console-plugin/source/src/components/pipeline-builder/sidebars/explore-type-sidebar.tsx

Apply ALL of the following 4 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Lines: 149, 207
Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-button-button-buttonprops-d-ts-button-variant-type-changed]:
Property 'Button.variant' had its type changed (property): Return type of `variant` changed from `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` to `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`

File: packages/react-core/src/components/Button/Button.ButtonProps.d.ts
Before: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
After: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: link

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropTypeChange
Component: Button
Prop: variant
From: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
To: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

Code contexts:
```
  (line 149):
  148                      isInline
  149                      variant="link"
  150                    >

  (line 207):
  206                          isInline
  207                          variant="link"
  208                        >

```

### Fix 2
Lines: 145, 201
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: BreadcrumbItem

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

Code contexts:
```
  (line 145):
  144                  ) : (
  145                    <Button
  146                      type="button"

  (line 201):
  200                      {path && (
  201                        <Button
  202                          type="button"

```

### Fix 3
Line: 166
Rule [sd-new-absorbing-prop-emptystate-titletext]:
Component <EmptyState> has a new prop `titleText` (type: `React.ReactNode`) added in v6 that accepts JSX content.

This prop may be intended to receive content that was previously passed as children. Review the JSX children of <EmptyState> and determine if any should be moved to the `titleText` prop.

Example migration:
  Before: <EmptyState>{content} other children</EmptyState>
  After:  <EmptyState titleText=>other children</EmptyState>

Incident context:
  componentName: EmptyState
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: TextContent

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: EmptyState
Prop: titleText
To: React.ReactNode

Code context:
```
  165          {_.isEmpty(currentProperties) ? (
  166            <EmptyState variant={EmptyStateVariant.xs}>
  167              <EmptyStateBody>{t('No Properties found')}</EmptyStateBody>

```

### Fix 4
Line: 10
Rule [semver-textcontent-component-import-deprecated]:
MIGRATION: Replace <TextContent> with props on <Content>.

Property mapping:
  - TextContent.className  →  Content.className
  - TextContent.children  →  Content.children
  - TextContent.isVisited  →  Content.isVisitedLink (renamed)

Remove <TextContent> from JSX and move its props to <Content>.
Also remove TextContent from the import statement.

Incident context:
  importedName: TextContent
  localName: TextContent
  module: @patternfly/react-core

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted

Code context:
```
    9    EmptyStateVariant,
   10    TextContent,
   11  } from '@patternfly/react-core';

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/console-plugin/source/src/components/pipeline-builder/sidebars/explore-type-sidebar.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me reason through each fix:

### Fix 1: `Button.variant` type change
Lines 149 and 207 use `variant="link"`. The value `"link"` is still valid in the new type (`'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`). **No change needed** — `"link"` is present in both old and new types.

### Fix 2: Icon children to `icon` prop on `<Button>`
Lines 145 and 201 — Looking at the actual Button usages:
- Line 145-152: `<Button>` contains `{crumb}` (text content, not an icon). No icon to move.
- Line 201-210: `<Button>` contains `{t('View details')}` (text content, not an icon). No icon to move.

**No change needed** — neither Button has icon children.

### Fix 3: `EmptyState` new `titleText` prop
Line 166: `<EmptyState variant={EmptyStateVariant.xs}>` with `<EmptyStateBody>{t('No Properties found')}</EmptyStateBody>` as child. In PF v6, `EmptyState` requires a `titleText` prop. The body text "No Properties found" is descriptive body text, not a title. I should add a `titleText` prop with appropriate content. Since there's no separate title component/text here, the "No Properties found" text serves as both title and body. I'll add `titleText` with that text.

### Fix 4: Replace `TextContent` with `Content`
Line 10: Import `TextContent`. Lines 159 and 218: `<TextContent>` and `</TextContent>`. Replace with `Content` in both import and JSX.

Let me apply all fixes:
Now apply Fix 3 — add `titleText` prop to `EmptyState`:
Now let me verify the final file looks correct:
The file looks correct with all applicable changes applied. Let me verify there are no remaining references to `TextContent`:

Good — no remaining references to `TextContent`. The file is clean.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1: `Button.variant` type change (`variant="link"`)
**No change needed.** The value `"link"` is valid in both the old and new type unions. The type change only added `'stateful'` as a new option; no existing values were removed or renamed.

### Fix 2: Icon children to `icon` prop on `<Button>`
**No change needed.** Neither Button instance contains icon children:
- Line 145: Children are `{crumb}` (text content from breadcrumb data)
- Line 201: Children are `{t('View details')}` (translated text string)

Both Buttons contain only text, so no icon-to-prop migration is applicable.

### Fix 3: `EmptyState` new `titleText` prop
**Applied.** Added `titleText={t('No Properties found')}` prop to the `<EmptyState>` component on line 166. In PF v6, `EmptyState` requires a `titleText` prop. The existing body text was reused as the title text since it describes the empty state condition.

### Fix 4: Replace `TextContent` with `Content`
**Applied.** Three changes made:
1. **Import (line 10):** Replaced `TextContent` with `Content` in the import from `@patternfly/react-core`
2. **Opening tag (line 159):** Changed `<TextContent>` to `<Content>`
3. **Closing tag (line 218):** Changed `</TextContent>` to `</Content>`

No props needed renaming (`isVisited` → `isVisitedLink`) since `TextContent` was used without any props in this file.

chunks.response:
Good — no remaining references to `TextContent`. The file is clean.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1: `Button.variant` type change (`variant="link"`)
**No change needed.** The value `"link"` is valid in both the old and new type unions. The type change only added `'stateful'` as a new option; no existing values were removed or renamed.

### Fix 2: Icon children to `icon` prop on `<Button>`
**No change needed.** Neither Button instance contains icon children:
- Line 145: Children are `{crumb}` (text content from breadcrumb data)
- Line 201: Children are `{t('View details')}` (translated text string)

Both Buttons contain only text, so no icon-to-prop migration is applicable.

### Fix 3: `EmptyState` new `titleText` prop
**Applied.** Added `titleText={t('No Properties found')}` prop to the `<EmptyState>` component on line 166. In PF v6, `EmptyState` requires a `titleText` prop. The existing body text was reused as the title text since it describes the empty state condition.

### Fix 4: Replace `TextContent` with `Content`
**Applied.** Three changes made:
1. **Import (line 10):** Replaced `TextContent` with `Content` in the import from `@patternfly/react-core`
2. **Opening tag (line 159):** Changed `<TextContent>` to `<Content>`
3. **Closing tag (line 218):** Changed `</TextContent>` to `</Content>`

No props needed renaming (`isVisited` → `isVisitedLink`) since `TextContent` was used without any props in this file.
